series_metadata.series_description: This record series consists of the following documents: General Ledger Records; General Requisitions; Inter-Departmental Purchase Order; Personal Service Contracts; Warrant Journals; Delivery Slips & Packing Lists; Direct Purchase Order; Purchase Order; Purchase Order Modifications; Purchase Order/Contract Encumbrance; Invoices; Requisitions for Supplies; Printing Orders; Out-of-State Travel Requests and the Travel Expense Report.
